title: Dashboard visualization improvements and bug fixes
body:
* **Counter visualization improvements**: You can now use counters to track and compare metrics over time and show sparklines. To create a counter with a sparkline, select a main value and a date column. See [Counter visualization](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations/types#counter).
* **Configure filter application behavior**: Dashboards now support applying multiple filters at the same time alongside the default instant application. See [Configure filter application behavior](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/settings#apply-filters).
* **Fixed data label positioning**: Resolved an issue where data labels were sometimes half above and half below bars on bar charts.
* **Fixed label color legibility**: Resolved an issue where label color was not legible against all background colors.
